title: trifolium desvauxii var. roussaeanum
intro: Trifolium desvauxii var. roussaeanum, also known as a variant of the Desvaux's clover, is a type of plant that belongs to the Fabaceae family. This plant is used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its diuretic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Trifolium desvauxii var. roussaeanum include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects.
